---
title: "Reproduction of Figure 2"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: yes
    number_sections: yes
    code_folding: show
---

# Setup and Libraries

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
required_packages <- c("readr", "ggplot2", "dplyr", "stringr", "svglite", "scales")
new_packages <- required_packages[!(required_packages %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if(length(new_packages)) install.packages(new_packages)
lapply(required_packages, library, character.only = TRUE)

Fig.Folder <- '../Outputs/Figure_2/'
if (!dir.exists(Fig.Folder)) {
  dir.create(Fig.Folder, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

# 1. Time Alignment Plots

This section generates the time alignment plots for different score cutoffs. The data used here is generated by running the `Figure_2_experiment.py` script.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Data Loading
# Adjust path to match the location where Figure_2_experiment.py saved the data
df <- read.csv("../Outputs/Figure_2/figure_2_experiment_data.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Plotting Function
# Generates a line plot of runtime vs sequence length for a specific score cutoff

generate_time_plot <- function(target_cutoff, output_filename) {
  
  label_size_method <- 4.0  
  label_size_fuzzy  <- 4.0   
  
  mm_alpha <- c("0"=1.00, "1"=0.80, "2"=0.60, "3"=0.45, "4"=0.32)
  
  df_filtered <- df %>% 
    filter(
      (Method == "wfa"  & score_cutoff == target_cutoff) |
      (Method != "wfa" & score_cutoff %in% c("0","1","2","3", 0,1,2,3))
    ) %>%
    filter(No_MM %in% 0:4) %>%
    mutate(
      No_MM = factor(No_MM, levels = 0:4),
      score_cutoff = as.character(score_cutoff),
      score_cutoff = ifelse(score_cutoff %in% c("0","1","2","3", target_cutoff), score_cutoff, score_cutoff)
    )

  df_filtered <- df_filtered %>%
    filter(score_cutoff %in% c(target_cutoff, "0", "1", "2", "3")) %>%
    mutate(score_cutoff = factor(score_cutoff, levels = c(target_cutoff, "0", "1", "2", "3")))
  
  df_plot <- df_filtered %>%
    mutate(
      Method_lab       = dplyr::recode(Method, fuzzy = "Fuzzysearch", wfa = "WFA2"),
      No_MM            = factor(No_MM, levels = 0:4),
      score_cutoff_chr = as.character(score_cutoff)
    )
  
  x_mid <- stats::median(range(df_plot$Length, na.rm = TRUE))
  x_lab <- df_plot$Length[which.min(abs(df_plot$Length - x_mid))] 
  
  lab_wfa <- df_plot %>%
    dplyr::filter(Method_lab == "WFA2",
                  score_cutoff_chr == target_cutoff,
                  No_MM == "0",
                  Length == x_lab) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      Method_lab = "WFA2",
      Length     = Length,
      y          = (1000 * Time) * 0.75, 
      label      = "WFA2"
    )

  lab_fuzzy <- df_plot %>%
    dplyr::filter(Method_lab == "Fuzzysearch",
                  score_cutoff_chr %in% c("0","1","2","3"),
                  No_MM == "4",
                  Length == x_lab) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(score_cutoff_chr) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(score_cutoff_chr, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Method_lab = "Fuzzysearch",
      label = paste0("Fuzzysearch (d=", score_cutoff_chr, ")")
    )
  
  N <- nrow(lab_fuzzy)
  if (N > 0) {
    offsets <- (seq_len(N) - (N + 1) / 2) * 0.06
    lab_fuzzy$y <- (1000 * lab_fuzzy$Time) * 0.75 * 10^offsets  # below MM=4 line + spaced
    lab_fuzzy$Length <- x_lab
    lab_fuzzy <- lab_fuzzy[, c("Method_lab", "Length", "y", "label")]
  } else {
    lab_fuzzy <- data.frame(Method_lab = character(0), Length = numeric(0), y = numeric(0), label = character(0))
  }

  
  linetype_vals <- c(
      "solid",    # target_cutoff (WFA2)
      "solid",    # Fuzzysearch default (2)
      "dashed",   # 0
      "dotted",   # 1
      "dotdash"   # 3
  )
  names(linetype_vals) <- c(target_cutoff, "2", "0", "1", "3")
  
  breaks_vals <- c(target_cutoff, "0", "1", "2", "3")
  
  p <- ggplot(
    df_plot,
    aes(
      x = Length, y = 1000 * Time,
      color    = Method_lab,
      linetype = score_cutoff_chr,
      alpha    = No_MM,
      group    = interaction(Method_lab, score_cutoff_chr, No_MM)
    )
  ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.3) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
    labs(
      x = "Sequence length (nu)",
      y = "Time (ms)"
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
      values = linetype_vals,
      breaks = breaks_vals
    ) +
    scale_alpha_manual(
      name   = "# Mismatches",
      values = mm_alpha,
      breaks = as.character(0:4),
      labels = as.character(0:4)
    ) +
    scale_y_log10(
      limits = c(0.2, 2000),
      breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),
      labels = scales::scientific_format()
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = seq(50, 150, by = 50)
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = lab_wfa,
      aes(x = Length, y = y, label = label, color = Method_lab),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 0.5,
      size  = label_size_method,
      fontface = "bold",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = lab_fuzzy,
      aes(x = Length, y = y, label = label, color = Method_lab),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 0.5,
      size  = label_size_fuzzy,
      fontface = "bold",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    guides(
      color    = "none",
      linetype = "none",
      alpha    = guide_legend(
        order = 1,
        nrow = 2,                 
        byrow = TRUE,
        override.aes = list(linetype = "solid", color = "black")
      )
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
      legend.justification = c(0, 1),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.65, "lines"),
      legend.spacing.x = unit(0.15, "lines"),
      legend.spacing.y = unit(0.10, "lines")
    )

  full_filename <- paste0(output_filename, ".svg")
  file_path <- file.path(Fig.Folder, full_filename)
  svglite::svglite(
    file_path,
    width = 6, height = 6, pointsize = 16
  )
  print(p)
  dev.off()
  
  print(p)
  message("Saved: ", file_path)
}

generate_time_plot("-", "Figure_2")

generate_time_plot("--", "Figure_S1")
```
